name: purse
description: A policy layer in front of your AI agent's payments. Set spending limits, require human approval over a threshold, and get a tamper-evident log of every decision. Zero dependencies.

scripts.test: tsx test/policy.test.ts && tsx test/evaluate.test.ts && tsx test/audit-explain.test.ts && tsx test/executor.test.ts && tsx test/grants.test.ts && tsx test/grants-reservation.test.ts && tsx test/broker.test.ts && tsx test/transport.test.ts && tsx test/transport-http.test.ts

author: Oluwasegun Araba (ARABA)
